sentences.arabic: أَعْلَنَتْ وِزَارَةُ التَّعْلِيمِ عَنْ نِظَامٍ جَدِيدٍ لِلِامْتِحَانَاتِ الْمَدْرَسِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ministarstvo obrazovanja najavilo je novi sistem školskih ispita.
sentences.translationEn: The Ministry of Education announced a new system for school exams.

sentences.arabic: يَهْدِفُ النِّظَامُ إِلَى تَقْلِيلِ الضَّغْطِ النَّفْسِيِّ عَلَى الطُّلَّابِ.
sentences.translation: Sistem ima za cilj smanjenje psihičkog pritiska na učenike.
sentences.translationEn: The system aims to reduce psychological pressure on students.

sentences.arabic: سَيَعْتَمِدُ التَّقْيِيمُ عَلَى الْأَنْشِطَةِ الصَّفِّيَّةِ وَالْأَبْحَاثِ الْعِلْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ocjenjivanje će se zasnivati na razrednim aktivnostima i naučnim istraživanjima.
sentences.translationEn: Assessment will be based on classroom activities and scientific research.

sentences.arabic: رَحَّبَ الْآبَاءُ وَالْمُعَلِّمُونَ بِهَذَا التَّغْيِيرِ الْإِيجَابِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Roditelji i nastavnici pozdravili su ovu pozitivnu promjenu.
sentences.translationEn: Parents and teachers welcomed this positive change.

sentences.arabic: تُحَاوِلُ الدَّوْلَةُ تَطْوِيرَ الْمَنَاهِجِ لِتُنَاسِبَ الْعَصْرَ الْحَدِيثَ.
sentences.translation: Država pokušava razviti nastavne planove i programe kako bi odgovarali modernom dobu.
sentences.translationEn: The state is trying to develop curricula to suit the modern era.
